hero.title: Master Japanese, Unlock Your Future
hero.subtitle: Join India's premium Japanese language institute. Learn from native and certified experts, prepare for JLPT, and connect with global career opportunities.

about.title: India's Leading Japanese Language Institute
about.p1: Established in 2000, SNRC has been a pioneer in bridging the linguistic and cultural gap between India and Japan. We focus on providing high-quality, structured Japanese language education tailored to students, professionals, and corporate organizations.
about.p2: Our team of highly experienced Indian instructors and Japanese native trainers utilize modern teaching methodologies to ensure students gain not just grammatical proficiency, but also real-world conversational confidence and deep cultural understanding.

services.title: Comprehensive Language Solutions
services.subtitle: From beginner courses to advanced corporate programs, we cater to all your Japanese linguistic and training needs.

courses.title: Japanese Language Courses
courses.desc: Comprehensive training for JLPT levels N5 through N1 with structured curricula and practice tests.

jlpt.title: JLPT Preparation
jlpt.desc: Special intensive mock exams, grammar sessions, and listening practices targeted at clearing JLPT tests.

corporate.title: Corporate Japanese Training
corporate.desc: Customized business etiquette and language training designed specifically for tech, automotive, and IT companies.

translation.title: Translation Services
translation.desc: High-accuracy, professional document translations for technical, legal, and business requirements.

interpretation.title: Interpretation Services
interpretation.desc: Expert bilingual interpreters for business delegations, corporate meetings, audits, and conferences.

culture.title: Cultural Training
culture.desc: Cross-cultural workshops covering Japanese business etiquettes, corporate manners, and lifestyles.

whyJapanese.title: Why Learn Japanese?
whyJapanese.subtitle: Learning Japanese is not just about a language; it is a strategic career asset that opens up global avenues.

career.title: Career Opportunities
career.desc: High demand for bilingual IT professionals, engineers, and translators in leading global corporations.

salary.title: Higher Salary Potential
salary.desc: Bilingual skills command premium salary packages and faster promotions in multi-national firms.

study.title: Study Abroad Options
study.desc: Access prestigious scholarships (like MEXT) and world-class universities in Japan.

culture.title: Japanese Culture
culture.desc: Deepen your understanding of Japanese heritage, values, anime, manga, and technological innovation.

networking.title: Global Networking
networking.desc: Form strong connections with Japanese business partners, colleagues, and international professionals.

demand.title: Corporate Demand
demand.desc: Japan's expanding investments and strategic partnerships in India create continuous job roles.

trust.title: Over 2 Decades of Excellence
trust.subtitle: Our numbers reflect our commitment to delivering top-tier language training.

testimonials.title: What Our Learners Say
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from our alumni who have successfully transitioned to Japan or built bilingual careers.

items.name: Rahul Sharma
items.review: The structured teaching at SNRC helped me clear JLPT N3. The mock interviews and placement support were invaluable in securing my job in Tokyo!

items.name: Priya Patil
items.review: Excellent faculty and study material. The cultural training was an added bonus that helped me understand Japanese corporate work culture prior to joining my company.

items.name: Arjun Kumar
items.review: Best place to learn Japanese in Bangalore. Instructors focus on conversation and practical usage, not just rules. The environment is extremely friendly.

items.name: Kenji Sato
items.review: SNRC designed a custom corporate training module for our engineers. Within months, their communication with Japanese stakeholders improved significantly.

items.name: Sneha Hegde
items.review: I started learning at SNRC from N5 and reached N2. Their guidance helped me clear the entrance for Waseda University with a scholarship!

clients.title: Our Corporate Clients
clients.subtitle: We provide language training, translation, and interpretation to leading multinational corporations.

contact.title: Start Your Journey Today
contact.subtitle: Have questions about courses, timings, or corporate batches? Drop us a line, and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.addrValue: No. 45, 2nd Floor, Residency Road, Bangalore, Karnataka - 560025

form.name: Full Name
form.subject: Select Course / Query
form.successText: Thank you for reaching out to SNRC. Our language counselors will connect with you shortly.

footer.desc: SNRC is Bangalore's premier Japanese language school, empowering students and professionals to unlock international careers and bridge global horizons since 2000.
